STATEMENT OF DECISION SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT SAKS FIFTH AVENUE, INC. A MASSACHUSETTS CORPORATION DBA SAKS FIFTH AVENUE RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF CASTELLUCCI, STEVE CLARK, GEORGE DELATORRE, CARL SHIFS, DONALD $5,924.74 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,924.74, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABORT COMMISSION ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF ON JAN. 25, 2002 IS HEREBY REVERSED AND VACATED. THE CLERK SHALL RELEASE THE UNDERTAKING FILED BY DEFENDANT IN CONNECTION WITH THIS APPEAL. SEE SCANNED DOC
